text: I feel as though I am stepping into a liminal corridor, a boundary between the everyday and the speculative. The glass, the curated lighting, the vibrant R+D lettering suggest a space devoted to thought, discovery, experimentation—a place humming with the potential of ideas. As I read the poetic invitation on the screen, I sense both anticipation and an inward quiet. The world slows itself here, inviting reflection. I feel curiosity, tempered by an awareness of possibility just beyond my grasp.
